pr_description:
*Issue #, if available:*
N/A

*Description of changes:*
Fix issues reported here: https://deepsource.io/gh/moulik-deepsource/diagram-maker

* fix(ActionDispatcher): Adding missing break statement inside switch case (https://deepsource.io/gh/moulik-deepsource/diagram-maker/issue/JS-0064/)
An additional Id check prevents any bugs currently, but adding break ensure that we dont leak bugs in the future due to fallthrough in the switch statement
* fix: Using className instead of class (https://deepsource.io/gh/moulik-deepsource/diagram-maker/issue/JS-0455/)
* fix: Using blocks for lexical declarations in switch case (https://deepsource.io/gh/moulik-deepsource/diagram-maker/issue/JS-0054/)
* fix: Removing explicit type declaration when using default values (https://deepsource.io/gh/moulik-deepsource/diagram-maker/issue/JS-0331/)

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that you can use, modify, copy, and redistribute this contribution, under the terms of your choice.

*Issue #, if available:*
https://github.com/awslabs/diagram-maker/issues/16

*Description of changes:*
Adding data attributes on edges for source node type & destination node type to allow for CSS overrides to be added to the edge based on source node types & destination node types.

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that you can use, modify, copy, and redistribute this contribution, under the terms of your choice.
commit_message: feature: Adding data attributes on edges for source node type & destination node type
